mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( code, detail, user_id, product_id, buy_price, buy_number, trade_status, trade_time, refund_status, refund_time, is_refund_confirm, create_time, address_id, is_confirm, is_confirm_time, is_deliver, deliver_adr_id, deliver_time, appointment_time, appointment_address, seller_confirm_time, buyer_confirm_time, seller_finish_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{detail}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{buyPrice}, #{buyNumber}, #{tradeStatus}, #{tradeTime}, #{refundStatus}, #{refundTime}, #{isRefundConfirm}, #{createTime}, #{addressId}, #{isConfirm}, #{isConfirmTime}, #{isDeliver}, #{deliverAdrId}, #{deliverTime}, #{appointmentTime}, #{appointmentAddress}, #{sellerConfirmTime}, #{buyerConfirmTime}, #{sellerFinishTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{cancelReason} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
detail = #{detail},
buy_price = #{buyPrice},
buy_number = #{buyNumber},
trade_status = #{tradeStatus},
trade_time = #{tradeTime},
refund_status = #{refundStatus},
refund_time = #{refundTime},
is_refund_confirm = #{isRefundConfirm},
address_id = #{addressId},
is_confirm = #{isConfirm},
is_confirm_time = #{isConfirmTime},
is_deliver = #{isDeliver},
deliver_adr_id = #{deliverAdrId},
deliver_time = #{deliverTime},
appointment_time = #{appointmentTime},
appointment_address = #{appointmentAddress},
seller_confirm_time = #{sellerConfirmTime},
buyer_confirm_time = #{buyerConfirmTime},
seller_finish_time = #{sellerFinishTime},
cancel_time = #{cancelTime},
cancel_reason = #{cancelReason},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM orders WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT o.*, buyer.user_name AS user_name, buyer.user_avatar AS user_avatar, p.name AS product_title, p.cover_list AS product_cover, p.user_id AS seller_id, seller.user_name AS seller_name, seller.user_avatar AS seller_avatar FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user buyer ON buyer.id = o.user_id LEFT JOIN product p ON p.id = o.product_id LEFT JOIN user seller ON seller.id = p.user_id
o.product_id IN
#{id}
1 = 0
AND o.trade_status = #{tradeStatus}
AND o.code LIKE concat('%', #{code}, '%')
ORDER BY o.id DESC
